issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck', which is a deck manipulation action, not trash. Should use 'PlayFromHand' or similar deck-placement action, or a custom 'PlaceOnTopOfDeck' if available.
Count is 2, but card text specifies 'up to 2 rested DON!!' cards. The action should include a 'filter' to ensure only rested DON cards are targeted, and count should reflect 'up to' (variable 1-2).
Missing filter on AttachDon action. Must filter for rested DON cards only (filter with HasRestingDon or similar).
